title: Supremely Optimized
description: These mods are mods to increase FPS, lower memory usage, fix memory leaks, bug fixes and overall just useful features.
body:
# I haven't played Minecraft in ages, I'm hoping to get around to playing the game soon, I don't think I'll abandon the project, but do not expect updates any time soon, and even when I do get around to it there will not be updates fast.

The best performance and quality of life mods for fabric 1.20.1.

These mods are mods to increase FPS, lower memory usage, fix memory leaks, bug fixes and overall just useful features.

![Vanilla 1.20.1 vs. Supremely Optimized for 1.20.1 FPS comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a46859a978d7f37749648954d07710143d39beef.png)

Huge thanks to the developers of these mods, their work is truly amazing and it contributes to me and many others Minecraft experience.
